query:
-- Baby Goat currently has: Alfalfa (id=1) at 2.5 kg - WRONG (should be Alfalfa Hay at 0.0)
-- Fix: change feedItemId from 1 (Alfalfa) to 2 (Alfalfa Hay) and set qty to 0.0
UPDATE ration_plans SET feedItemId = 2, qtyPerHeadPerDay = 0.0 WHERE id = 30001;

-- Add missing Baby Goat rows: Hay (0.2), Concentrate 14% (0.2)
INSERT INTO ration_plans (categoryId, feedItemId, qtyPerHeadPerDay, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
  (7, 7, 0.2, 1, NOW(), NOW()),   -- Baby Goat + Hay
  (7, 5, 0.2, 1, NOW(), NOW());   -- Baby Goat + Concentrate 14%
